Product Description
The Inspiration:
This ring represents the wave of cherished memories that we feel. Your ring collection wouldn't be complete without ...
Show More

This ring represents the wave of cherished memories that we feel. Your ring collection wouldn't be complete without this.

The Design:
This golden ring has a layered wave design with one layer studded with zircon.
  • 925 Silver with Gold Plating
  • Perfect for sensitive skin
  • Adjustable size to ensure no fitting issues
  • Ring Diameter: 1.66 cm + Adjustable
  • Comes with the GIVA Jewellery kit and authenticity certificate
  • Content: Ring
  • Net Qty - 1 unit
Styling Tip:
Pair this with a boho dress.
